projects.goal: Establish a reliable organoid model for subsequent assays — baseline

rawSections.Goal:
Establish a reliable organoid model for subsequent assays — baseline
media protocol working, two cell types validated, doubling time
characterised, failure modes documented.
rawSections.Checkpoints:
- [x] **Media v2 protocol** — 2026-04-18. DoD: reliable across 6 passages.
- [ ] **Cell type B stable** — 2026-04-30. DoD: contamination-free across 3 consecutive weeks.
- [ ] **Doubling time characterised** — 2026-05-15. DoD: data for both cell types with SE < 10%.
- [ ] **Failure mode catalogue** — 2026-06-15. DoD: top 5 failures documented with root cause.
- [ ] **Ready for assay** — 2026-09-30. DoD: protocol reviewed by 1 external researcher.
rawSections.Lab work: Daily maintenance MWF. Media v2 stable — 6 consecutive clean passages.
rawSections.Paper / writing: Not yet drafting. Method notes accumulating in lab notebook.
rawSections.Meetings: Monthly sync with Sara. Quarterly check-in with PI.
rawSections.Blockers:
- Cell type B contamination traced to shared incubator — isolation plan
  pending equipment availability.
rawSections.Notes:
Consider rotating cell type B to a different incubator to isolate the
contamination variable. Check with Jim on incubator schedule.

projects.title: R01 renewal
projects.goal: Submit R01 renewal by Aug 1, 2026 with strong preliminary data for Aim 3.

rawSections.Goal: Submit R01 renewal by Aug 1, 2026 with strong preliminary data for Aim 3.
rawSections.Checkpoints:
- [x] **Aim 1 outline** — 2026-04-10. DoD: preliminary results summarised.
- [x] **Aim 3 outline** — 2026-04-17. DoD: conceptual framework + gaps identified.
- [ ] **Preliminary data for Aim 3** — 2026-05-30. DoD: 2 supporting figures.
- [ ] **Full Aim 3 draft** — 2026-06-30. DoD: 1500 words, figures integrated.
- [ ] **Full draft (all aims)** — 2026-07-20. DoD: complete sections + budget.
- [ ] **Submission** — 2026-08-01. DoD: ERA Commons uploaded + confirmed.
rawSections.Lab work: Aim 3 preliminary experiments scheduled for May — 6-week runway.
rawSections.Paper / writing: Aim 3 outline drafted (2026-04-17). Rest pending prelim data.
rawSections.Meetings:
Weekly check-in with Prof Smith on grant status. Administrative
pre-submission review 2 weeks before deadline.
rawSections.Notes:
Last R01 submission's reviewer feedback focused on Aim 3 weakness —
this renewal's strategy is to lead with stronger prelim data there.

not started (blocked on antibody).
